output.model_sql: WITH conversation_details AS (SELECT CONVERSATIONID, AGENT_NAME, RESOLUTION FROM DW_NLP.LLM_FUNCTION_CALL_DATA WHERE EVENT_DATE >= DATEADD(day, -30, CURRENT_DATE()))

decision_log.decision: Gathered full model context from DBT_MODELS and GitHub
decision_log.rationale: Model is a table materialization owned by @corinne.smallwood, tagged cs/semidaily. Upstream is dw_nlp.llm_function_call_data. No recent commits found in last 48h.

tool_calls.input: SELECT NAME, MATERIALIZATION, SCHEMA_NAME, TAGS, JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(META, 'owner') as owner FROM DW.DATAOPS_DBT.DBT_MODELS WHERE NAME = 'cs_chatbot_conversation_agg'
